zh.Hillsborough Castle, County Down, Irelan: 愛爾蘭庫迪 唐希爾斯波洛 卡素
zh.of Antrim, Ulster, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 安特里姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gormley Kavanaugh於大約1425年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 唐希爾斯波洛 卡素時，她的父親Donald Reagh Kavanaugh30歲，母親Catherine O'Nolan16歲。她和Henry OR Enrí O'Néill King of Ulster至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1465年在愛爾蘭武爾斯特享年41歲。

zh-hans.Hillsborough Castle, County Down, Irelan: 爱尔兰庫迪 唐希爾斯波洛 卡素
zh-hans.of Antrim, Ulster, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 安特里姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gormley Kavanaugh于大约1425年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 唐希爾斯波洛 卡素时，她的父亲Donald Reagh Kavanaugh30岁，母亲Catherine O'Nolan16岁。她和Henry OR Enrí O'Néill King of Ulster至少有6个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1465年在爱尔兰武爾斯特享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kavanaugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Oonagh.

variants.name: Kavanagh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Aileen, Brendan, Cathal, Conor, Eamon, Keelin, Liam, Michael Sean, Niall, Ronan, Sean Patrick.

Irish: from Caomhánach, an adjectival epithet meaning ‘belonging to (Saint) Caomhán’, whose personal name means ‘little beautiful one’. Etymologically, the first part of the name is the same as that in Kevin .

History: The first known bearer of the epithet was Domhnall Caomhánach (Donal Kavanagh, died in 1175), the son of Diarmait Mac Murchadha (Dermot McMurrough), king of Leinster in the 12th century. Despite being killed at an early age, Domhnall Caomhánach gave his name to a large and important family in Irish history.

nameMeanings.name: Gormley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aileen, Brigid, Declan, Eamonn, Nuala.
Irish (Tyrone): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gormghaile ‘descendant of Gormghal’, a personal name from gorm ‘noble, dark blue’ + gal ‘valor’.

variants.name: Gromley
meanings: Irish: possibly a metathesized form of   Gormley  .

en.lifeSummary: When Gormley Kavanaugh was born about 1425, in Hillsborough Castle, County Down, Ireland, her father, Donald Reagh Kavanaugh, was 30 and her mother, Catherine O'Nolan, was 16. She had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Henry OR Enrí O'Néill King of Ulster. She died in 1465, in Ulster, Ireland, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gormley Kavanaugh est née environ 1425, à Hillsborough Castle, County Down, Irlande, son père, Donald Reagh Kavanaugh, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Catherine O'Nolan, avait 16 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec Henry OR Enrí O'Néill King of Ulster. Elle est décédée en 1465, à Ulster, Irlande, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gormley Kavanaugh um 1425 in Hillsborough Castle, County Down, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Donald Reagh Kavanaugh 30 und ihre Mutter Catherine O'Nolan 16. Sie hatte mit Henry OR Enrí O'Néill King of Ulster mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1465 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Ulster, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gormley Kavanaugh è nata il circa 1425 nel Hillsborough Castle, County Down, Irlanda, sua padre, Donald Reagh Kavanaugh, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Catherine O'Nolan, aveva 16 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie con Henry OR Enrí O'Néill King of Ulster. Morì nel 1465, nel Ulster, Irlanda, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gormley Kavanaughが約1425年にアイルランドコウントイ ダウンヒルスボロウ カストルで生まれた時，父Donald Reagh Kavanaughは30歳，母Catherine O'Nolanは16歳であった。彼女はHenry OR Enrí O'Néill King of Ulsterとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1465年にアイルランドウルスターで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gormley Kavanaugh(이)가 대략 1425년 아일랜드 카운티 다운 힐스버루그h 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Donald Reagh Kavanaugh(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine O'Nolan(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 Henry OR Enrí O'Néill King of Ulster(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1465년 아일랜드 울스터에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gormley Kavanaugh nasceu aproximadamente 1425, em Hillsborough Castle, County Down, Irlanda, seu pai, Donald Reagh Kavanaugh, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Catherine O'Nolan, tinha 16 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas com Henry OR Enrí O'Néill King of Ulster. Ela faleceu em 1465, em Ulster, Irlanda, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gormley Kavanaugh родилась около 1425 г. в местности хиллсбороую кастл, коунти доун, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Donald Reagh Kavanaugh было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine O'Nolan, 16. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери от Henry OR Enrí O'Néill King of Ulster. Она умерла в 1465 г. в местности улстир, Ирландия в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gormley Kavanaugh nació aproximadamente 1425, en Hillsborough Castle, County Down, Irlanda, su papá, Donald Reagh Kavanaugh, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Catherine O'Nolan, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas con Henry OR Enrí O'Néill King of Ulster. Murió en 1465, en Ulster, Irlanda, a la edad de 41 años.
